_note: ADR 0034 Stage 1 — curated novel-yet-elementary FLAVOUR anchors shown to the conjecturer as proposal-side context. These are NOT a gate and are NEVER proposed verbatim; they model a DIFFERENT structure from the textbook 'P(n) divisible by k' genre (e.g. characterizing a residue SET). Operator-editable: each entry must be TRUE, formalizable in the faithfulness DSL, and non-trivial. Keep the list short (a handful). ADR 0034 §9 / §1 (the human-curated nature is an acknowledged limit: this does not scale past the operator's imagination).

exemplars.statement: A perfect square leaves remainder 0 or 1 modulo 4 (never 2 or 3)
exemplars.flavor: residue-SET characterization, not a single divisibility

exemplars.statement: A perfect square is congruent to 0 or 1 modulo 3
exemplars.flavor: residue-SET characterization at a different modulus

exemplars.statement: A perfect cube is congruent to 0, 1, or 8 modulo 9
exemplars.flavor: residue-SET characterization, a less obvious modulus
